    shells/fish: Update to 3.5.0

    While here, drop superfluous `DOCS` from `OPTIONS_DEFAULT` as it's already
    an implicit option.

    Changes:        https://github.com/fish-shell/fish-shell/releases/tag/3.5.0
    PR:             264832
    Approved by:    asomers (maintainer)
